name: Animated List
description: A list that animates each item in sequence with a delay. Used to showcase notifications or events on your landing page.

visual_summary: Animated List is a reusable component that displays a list of items with animation. It's ideal for showcasing a collection of items with a smooth transition effect. You can use it when you want to create a visually appealing and dynamic list.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready list component with the following characteristics:

Name: Animated List
Description: Animated List is a reusable component that displays a list of items with animation. It's ideal for showcasing a collection of items with a smooth transition effect. You can use it when you want to create a visually appealing and dynamic list.
Style: e.g. minimalist, smooth
Interactions: e.g. fade in, slide in
Tags: list, animation, dynamic

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
